inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the individual in years.

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate, typically measured upon waking.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resting heart rate, typically measured upon waking.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle uyanırken ölçülen dinlenme kalp atış hızı.

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute. Enter 0 to estimate from age (220 - age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute. Enter 0 to estimate from age (220 - age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki atım cinsinden maksimum kalp atış hızı. Yaştan tahmin etmek için 0 girin (220 - yaş).

inputs.label: Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of heart rate reserve used for anaerobic threshold (commonly 80-90%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of heart rate reserve used for anaerobic threshold (commonly 80-90%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anaerobik eşik için kullanılan kalp atış hızı rezervinin yüzdesi (genellikle %80-90).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
